title: Marketingmanager (m/w/d) - B2B, Campaign & Content
summary: Candidate's B2B campaign analytics and lead funnel experience are relevant, but the role demands hands-on SEO/SEA execution, German copywriting, and CMS ownership that are not evidenced in the CV.
key_requirements: Degree in Marketing, Communications, BWL or comparable (required)
Performance marketing, SEO/SEA, and lead generation hands-on experience (required)
Strong understanding of marketing data, KPIs, and conversion optimisation (required)
Experience with Google Ads, GA4, LinkedIn Campaign Manager, marketing automation or CRM (required)
CMS experience e.g. WordPress, website management (required)
Interest in AI tools and marketing technology (required)
matched_skills: B2B campaign planning and execution (IoT and ATM manufacturing roles)
Campaign ROI analytics and KPI tracking
Multi-channel campaign coverage (trade fairs, digital, social adjacency)
missing_skills: SEO/SEA hands-on execution (Google Ads, keyword management)
GA4 — no evidence of Google Analytics usage
German copywriting at professional level (B1+ insufficient for 'sehr gutes Copywriting auf Deutsch')
Marketing automation or CRM platform experience (HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.)
Landingpage development and conversion funnel building
AI tool usage for content or campaign workflow
recommended_emphasis: Lead with B2B campaign experience at Intelligent Power Corporation and GRG Banking — directly maps to B2B campaign ownership requirement
Highlight lead funnel analytics and qualified lead rate improvement as concrete lead-generation results
Emphasise data-driven optimisation mindset and KPI-driven campaign management
Frame competitive intelligence and market segmentation as strategic marketing capability
Mention A/B testing and experiment design to demonstrate conversion optimisation awareness
If any GA, LinkedIn Ads, or CMS experience exists even informally, surface it
language_requirement: German (very good copywriting, required); English (very good copywriting, required)
location_notes: Hamburg — candidate based in Luneburg, commutable
risk_flags: German copywriting at B1+ level is a hard gap — role requires professional-level German written communication
No SEO/SEA, Google Ads, or GA4 evidence — core technical requirement for a performance marketing role
CMS/WordPress ownership not evidenced — role includes website management responsibility
Small company (market research institute) expects one person to own all marketing — bandwidth and breadth may be a concern
